activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense of the earlier event.
activities.prompt: When we arrived, the train has left.

evaluator.answer: When we arrived, the train had left

activities.explanation: La salida ocurrió antes de otro punto pasado y usa «had left».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the irregular participle.
activities.prompt: She had went home before the meeting ended.

evaluator.answer: She had gone home before the meeting ended

activities.explanation: Después de «had» necesitamos el participio «gone».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting the irregular participle.
activities.prompt: Had the driver saw the warning before the incident?

evaluator.answer: Had the driver seen the warning before the incident

activities.explanation: La pregunta conserva el participio «seen».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the negative participle.
activities.prompt: I hadn't ate breakfast, so I was hungry.

evaluator.answer: I hadn't eaten breakfast, so I was hungry

activities.explanation: El participio de «eat» es «eaten».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the past perfect form.
activities.prompt: By noon, we had finish the inspection.

evaluator.answer: By noon, we had finished the inspection

activities.explanation: Después de «had» usamos el participio «finished».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the participle after the adverb.
activities.prompt: When I called, Omar had already hear the news.

evaluator.answer: When I called, Omar had already heard the news

activities.explanation: La secuencia es «had + already + heard».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the participle.
activities.prompt: The guests had just leave when our taxi arrived.

evaluator.answer: The guests had just left when our taxi arrived

activities.explanation: El participio de «leave» es «left».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the irregular participle.
activities.prompt: Before that trip, Nora had never flew in a plane.

evaluator.answer: Before that trip, Nora had never flown in a plane

activities.explanation: El participio de «fly» es «flown».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the earlier cause.
activities.prompt: We couldn't pay because I have left my wallet at home.

evaluator.answer: We couldn't pay because I had left my wallet at home

activities.explanation: La causa es anterior a un problema pasado y usa «had left».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the earlier cause.
activities.prompt: The path was slippery because it has rained overnight.

evaluator.answer: The path was slippery because it had rained overnight

activities.explanation: La lluvia ocurrió antes del estado pasado del camino.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the past perfect participle.
activities.prompt: When I arrived, Maya had leave already.

evaluator.answer: When I arrived, Maya had already left

activities.explanation: La forma natural es «had already left».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sequence naturally, removing unnecessary past perfect.
activities.prompt: I had opened the door, had entered and had switched on the light.

evaluator.answer: I opened the door, entered and switched on the light

activities.explanation: Los eventos siguen el orden cronológico y usan past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the form after «after».
activities.prompt: After I did locked the door, I walked towards the station.

evaluator.answer: After I locked the door, I walked towards the station

activities.explanation: La afirmativa en past simple usa directamente «locked».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the event earlier than the return.
activities.prompt: I returned to check the door after I have left the building.

evaluator.answer: I returned to check the door after I had left the building

activities.explanation: La salida anterior a un regreso pasado usa «had left».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense before the past limit.
activities.prompt: By the time the doors opened, a long queue has formed.

evaluator.answer: By the time the doors opened, a long queue had formed

activities.explanation: El resultado anterior a un límite pasado usa «had formed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the earlier belief.
activities.prompt: I thought I have saved the document, but the folder was empty.

evaluator.answer: I thought I had saved the document, but the folder was empty

activities.explanation: El supuesto guardado era anterior al pensamiento.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the stative verb.
activities.prompt: They had been knowing each other for years before they worked together.

evaluator.answer: They had known each other for years before they worked together

activities.explanation: «Know» es un verbo de estado y usa past perfect simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the participle.
activities.prompt: The lift had stop a second before we entered it.

evaluator.answer: The lift had stopped a second before we entered it

activities.explanation: Después de «had» usamos el participio «stopped».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the later completed action.
activities.prompt: The server had failed overnight, so the technician did replaced it before opening time.

evaluator.answer: The server had failed overnight, so the technician replaced it before opening time

activities.explanation: La afirmativa posterior usa past simple «replaced».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense at a past reference point.
activities.prompt: At noon, the replacement parcel hasn't arrived yet.

evaluator.answer: At noon, the replacement parcel hadn't arrived yet

activities.explanation: La acción seguía pendiente en un punto pasado: «hadn't arrived».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the earlier relative-clause event.
activities.prompt: I opened the box and found the part that the supplier has sent.

evaluator.answer: I opened the box and found the part that the supplier had sent

activities.explanation: El envío fue anterior a la apertura y usa «had sent».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the irregular participle.
activities.prompt: We had took the wrong path, so we reached the village from the north.

evaluator.answer: We had taken the wrong path, so we reached the village from the north

activities.explanation: El participio de «take» es «taken».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting all three verb forms.
activities.prompt: Lena had miss the bus, so she did called us and wait for the next one.

evaluator.answer: Lena had missed the bus, so she called us and waited for the next one

activities.explanation: Usamos «had missed» para el retroceso y «called», «waited» para la secuencia posterior.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting its auxiliary structure.
activities.prompt: Did Ravi had used the software before the training began?

evaluator.answer: Had Ravi used the software before the training began

activities.explanation: La pregunta usa «Had + sujeto + participio», sin «did».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sequence naturally, removing unnecessary past perfect.
activities.prompt: I had scanned my ticket, had entered the hall and had found my seat.

evaluator.answer: I scanned my ticket, entered the hall and found my seat

activities.explanation: La secuencia directa se narra con past simple.
